case_title: LINDA ROSEN VS. CHRISTOPHER F. MAYO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSEN, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT MAYO, CHRISTOPHER F. DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
